name: compliance trace: a framework appears in compliance_state ONLY when at least one rule from the generated code cited it (no padding from the full catalog)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc --consulted-compliance soc2-tsc --emit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json" && grep "soc2-tsc" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json 1>&2 && ! grep "nist-csf-2" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && echo ok 1>&2
